creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 186637
updated patch file

According to following example of Porter's Handbook, LICENSE_FILE does not have to be specified in this case.

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/licenses.html#licenses-license-ex1

So please commit attached patch instead of original one.
